Make Your Epic Dance Party Happen

Your celebration deserves to be unforgettable. Whether it’s your wedding, anniversary, or special event, Dance On Time brings together expert instruction, professional DJ services, and stunning portable dance floors to create the perfect dance experience.

Our Three Services

Professional Dance Instruction

Learn to dance with confidence. From wedding first dances to group choreography, our regionally-awarded instructor specializes in Country Two Step, Waltz, Swing, Salsa, and Bachata. Perfect for couples, individuals, and groups.

Learn More →

Professional DJ Services

Keep the energy high all night long. Our DJ provides seamless music mixing across all genres, MC services, and full coordination with your dance floor and choreography.

Learn More →

Portable Dance Floor Rental

Transform any venue into a dance hall. Our LED-lit, professional-grade portable dance floors come in multiple sizes with full setup and breakdown service.

Learn More →

Complete Event Packages

Combine our services for your perfect event. Get instruction, entertainment, and the ideal dancing surface—all coordinated seamlessly.

Ready to dance? Contact us to start planning your celebration.
